basic_details.job_title: Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 June 2026 on the official website wbhealth.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biotechnology, M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Biotechnology / M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics from any recognized University

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at Burdwan Medical College?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Assistant position is scheduled for 30th June 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Biotechnology or an M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics from a recognized university to be eligible for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Assistant post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will the selection be done for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-In-Interview conducted by the Institute Level Recruitment Committee.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and any other relevant certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Burdwan Medical College, Purba Burdwan, West Bengal, with the pincode 713104.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Research Assistant recruitment at Burdwan Medical College is 1834.
